message.content:
Implement the following plan:

# Analytics Dashboard — Mobile-Friendly Redesign & UI Enhancement

## Context
The Analytics page works on desktop but has limited mobile responsiveness (only one `@media (max-width: 480px)` breakpoint). The user wants it fully mobile-friendly with an enhanced, aesthetic UI. The current design is functional but plain — we'll elevate it with a warm editorial luxury feel consistent with the app's existing aesthetic (Playfair Display, Lora, Outfit fonts, amber/sage accents, glass morphism).

## Design Direction
**Aesthetic:** Warm editorial — refined, literary, intimate. Think a beautifully typeset book's data appendix.
- Subtle warm gradients and soft glows instead of flat cards
- Slightly translucent card backgrounds with backdrop-blur (glass morphism, matching app convention)
- Amber and sage remain the accent palette; introduce a soft rose (`#c97b7b`) as a third accent for variety
- Delicate divider lines, refined spacing, and generous breathing room on mobile
- Charts get softer styling with rounded edges and gentle gradients

## Files to Modify

### 1. `client/src/components/Analytics/AnalyticsDashboard.css` (full rewrite)
Major CSS changes:

**Mobile responsiveness (new breakpoints):**
- `@media (max-width: 768px)` — tablet: stack charts to 1-col, reduce padding
- `@media (max-width: 480px)` — phone: 2-col summary grid, compact range pills, smaller fonts, full-bleed cards, tighter gaps
- `@media (max-width: 360px)` — small phone: further compact stat tiles

**UI enhancements:**
- `.analytics-dashboard`: add `padding: 20px 16px` on mobile (currently 0 horizontal padding)
- `.analytics-stat-tile`: glass morphism — `background: rgba(var(--bg-card-rgb), 0.7)`, `backdrop-filter: blur(12px)`, subtle warm border glow on hover
- `.analytics-chart-card`: same glass treatment, rounded corners 16px, soft shadow
- `.analytics-range-selector`: horizontal scroll on mobile with `overflow-x: auto`, hide scrollbar, snap behavior
- `.analytics-header`: column layout on mobile with title centered, range selector full-width
- `.analytics-top-post-row`: touch-friendly min-height 48px, larger tap targets
- `.analytics-breakdown-bar-fill`: gradient fill (amber to sage) instead of flat amber
- `.analytics-post-rank`: warm amber circle badge instead of plain text
- Chart containers: reduce `min-height` to 180px on mobile for better fit
- Tooltip: glass morphism with subtle border

### 2. `client/src/components/Analytics/AnalyticsDashboard.jsx`
- No structural changes needed — the component composition is clean
- Just ensure the `motion.div` wrapper has appropriate mobile animation (reduce `y` offset on mobile for snappier feel)

### 3. `client/src/components/Analytics/ViewsChart.jsx`
- Reduce chart margin-left on mobile: `left: -25` → `left: -15` for better label fit
- Reduce tick font size on mobile via Recharts tick props (already 11px, keep as-is)

### 4. `client/src/components/Analytics/ReactionsChart.jsx`
- Same margin adjustment as ViewsChart

### 5. `client/src/components/Analytics/PublishingFrequency.jsx`
- Same margin adjustment as ViewsChart
- Reduce `maxBarSize` to 24 on mobile

### 6. `client/src/components/Analytics/TopPosts.jsx`
- On mobile, hide the score badge to save space — show only rank + title + stats
- Add `analytics-post-score-mobile-hide` class with `display: none` at 480px

### 7. `client/src/components/Analytics/AnalyticsSummary.jsx`
- No changes needed (grid handles responsive via CSS)

### 8. `client/src/components/Analytics/TimeRangeSelector.jsx`
- No changes needed (CSS handles responsive)

### 9. `client/src/components/Analytics/ReactionBreakdown.jsx`
- Hide the text label on mobile (keep emoji + bar + count) to save horizontal space
- Add `analytics-breakdown-label-mobile-hide` class

## Detailed CSS Plan

### New responsive breakpoints to add:

```
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .analytics-charts-grid → 1 column
  .analytics-dashboard → padding: 16px 12px
  Chart min-height → 200px
}

@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .analytics-dashboard → padding: 12px 8px, gap: 12px
  .analytics-summary-grid → 2 columns
  .analytics-stat-tile → smaller padding/fonts
  .analytics-tile-value → 20px
  .analytics-range-selector → overflow-x auto, full width
  .analytics-range-pill → smaller padding
  .analytics-header → column, align start
  .analytics-title → 18px
  .analytics-chart-card → border-radius: 12px, padding: 12px
  Chart min-height → 180px
  .analytics-post-score → display: none
  .analytics-breakdown-label → display: none
  .analytics-top-post-row → padding 8px, min-height 44px
  .analytics-post-stats → font-size 10px
}
```

### Glass morphism enhancements (all screen sizes):

```css
.analytics-stat-tile {
  background: var(--bg-card, rgba(255,255,255,0.85));
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
}

.analytics-chart-card {
  background: var(--bg-card, rgba(255,255,255,0.85));
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  border-radius: 16px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
}

.analytics-post-rank {
  background: rgba(245,158,11,0.12);
  border-radius: 50%;
  width: 32px; height: 32px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
}
```

### Dark mode additions:
```css
[data-theme="dark"] .analytics-stat-tile {
  background: rgba(30,30,30,0.7);
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}
[data-theme="dark"] .analytics-chart-card {
  background: rgba(30,30,30,0.7);
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}
```

## Verification
1. Open the app on desktop — confirm the glass morphism and refined styling looks good
2. Resize browser to tablet (~768px) — charts should stack to 1-column
3. Resize to phone (~480px) — summary grid 2-col, compact range pills, score badges hidden, labels hidden in reaction breakdown
4. Test on actual mobile device or Chrome DevTools mobile simulation
5. Toggle dark mode — verify glass cards adapt properly
6. Verify all charts render correctly at each breakpoint (no overflow/clipping)
7. Verify touch targets are large enough on mobile (44px+ height on interactive rows)


If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: C:\Users\johnm\.claude\projects\C--Users-johnm-iskrib-v3\8333af39-fb69-4dc5-a38e-19643b018686.jsonl

planContent:
# Analytics Dashboard — Mobile-Friendly Redesign & UI Enhancement

## Context
The Analytics page works on desktop but has limited mobile responsiveness (only one `@media (max-width: 480px)` breakpoint). The user wants it fully mobile-friendly with an enhanced, aesthetic UI. The current design is functional but plain — we'll elevate it with a warm editorial luxury feel consistent with the app's existing aesthetic (Playfair Display, Lora, Outfit fonts, amber/sage accents, glass morphism).

## Design Direction
**Aesthetic:** Warm editorial — refined, literary, intimate. Think a beautifully typeset book's data appendix.
- Subtle warm gradients and soft glows instead of flat cards
- Slightly translucent card backgrounds with backdrop-blur (glass morphism, matching app convention)
- Amber and sage remain the accent palette; introduce a soft rose (`#c97b7b`) as a third accent for variety
- Delicate divider lines, refined spacing, and generous breathing room on mobile
- Charts get softer styling with rounded edges and gentle gradients

## Files to Modify

### 1. `client/src/components/Analytics/AnalyticsDashboard.css` (full rewrite)
Major CSS changes:

**Mobile responsiveness (new breakpoints):**
- `@media (max-width: 768px)` — tablet: stack charts to 1-col, reduce padding
- `@media (max-width: 480px)` — phone: 2-col summary grid, compact range pills, smaller fonts, full-bleed cards, tighter gaps
- `@media (max-width: 360px)` — small phone: further compact stat tiles

**UI enhancements:**
- `.analytics-dashboard`: add `padding: 20px 16px` on mobile (currently 0 horizontal padding)
- `.analytics-stat-tile`: glass morphism — `background: rgba(var(--bg-card-rgb), 0.7)`, `backdrop-filter: blur(12px)`, subtle warm border glow on hover
- `.analytics-chart-card`: same glass treatment, rounded corners 16px, soft shadow
- `.analytics-range-selector`: horizontal scroll on mobile with `overflow-x: auto`, hide scrollbar, snap behavior
- `.analytics-header`: column layout on mobile with title centered, range selector full-width
- `.analytics-top-post-row`: touch-friendly min-height 48px, larger tap targets
- `.analytics-breakdown-bar-fill`: gradient fill (amber to sage) instead of flat amber
- `.analytics-post-rank`: warm amber circle badge instead of plain text
- Chart containers: reduce `min-height` to 180px on mobile for better fit
- Tooltip: glass morphism with subtle border

### 2. `client/src/components/Analytics/AnalyticsDashboard.jsx`
- No structural changes needed — the component composition is clean
- Just ensure the `motion.div` wrapper has appropriate mobile animation (reduce `y` offset on mobile for snappier feel)

### 3. `client/src/components/Analytics/ViewsChart.jsx`
- Reduce chart margin-left on mobile: `left: -25` → `left: -15` for better label fit
- Reduce tick font size on mobile via Recharts tick props (already 11px, keep as-is)

### 4. `client/src/components/Analytics/ReactionsChart.jsx`
- Same margin adjustment as ViewsChart

### 5. `client/src/components/Analytics/PublishingFrequency.jsx`
- Same margin adjustment as ViewsChart
- Reduce `maxBarSize` to 24 on mobile

### 6. `client/src/components/Analytics/TopPosts.jsx`
- On mobile, hide the score badge to save space — show only rank + title + stats
- Add `analytics-post-score-mobile-hide` class with `display: none` at 480px

### 7. `client/src/components/Analytics/AnalyticsSummary.jsx`
- No changes needed (grid handles responsive via CSS)

### 8. `client/src/components/Analytics/TimeRangeSelector.jsx`
- No changes needed (CSS handles responsive)

### 9. `client/src/components/Analytics/ReactionBreakdown.jsx`
- Hide the text label on mobile (keep emoji + bar + count) to save horizontal space
- Add `analytics-breakdown-label-mobile-hide` class

## Detailed CSS Plan

### New responsive breakpoints to add:

```
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .analytics-charts-grid → 1 column
  .analytics-dashboard → padding: 16px 12px
  Chart min-height → 200px
}

@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .analytics-dashboard → padding: 12px 8px, gap: 12px
  .analytics-summary-grid → 2 columns
  .analytics-stat-tile → smaller padding/fonts
  .analytics-tile-value → 20px
  .analytics-range-selector → overflow-x auto, full width
  .analytics-range-pill → smaller padding
  .analytics-header → column, align start
  .analytics-title → 18px
  .analytics-chart-card → border-radius: 12px, padding: 12px
  Chart min-height → 180px
  .analytics-post-score → display: none
  .analytics-breakdown-label → display: none
  .analytics-top-post-row → padding 8px, min-height 44px
  .analytics-post-stats → font-size 10px
}
```

### Glass morphism enhancements (all screen sizes):

```css
.analytics-stat-tile {
  background: var(--bg-card, rgba(255,255,255,0.85));
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
}

.analytics-chart-card {
  background: var(--bg-card, rgba(255,255,255,0.85));
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  border-radius: 16px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
}

.analytics-post-rank {
  background: rgba(245,158,11,0.12);
  border-radius: 50%;
  width: 32px; height: 32px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
}
```

### Dark mode additions:
```css
[data-theme="dark"] .analytics-stat-tile {
  background: rgba(30,30,30,0.7);
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}
[data-theme="dark"] .analytics-chart-card {
  background: rgba(30,30,30,0.7);
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}
```

## Verification
1. Open the app on desktop — confirm the glass morphism and refined styling looks good
2. Resize browser to tablet (~768px) — charts should stack to 1-column
3. Resize to phone (~480px) — summary grid 2-col, compact range pills, score badges hidden, labels hidden in reaction breakdown
4. Test on actual mobile device or Chrome DevTools mobile simulation
5. Toggle dark mode — verify glass cards adapt properly
6. Verify all charts render correctly at each breakpoint (no overflow/clipping)
7. Verify touch targets are large enough on mobile (44px+ height on interactive rows)

content.text:
Now let me update the chart components to use responsive margins. I'll detect mobile via a hook or use the simpler approach of reducing the left margin across all sizes (the plan says `left: -15` on mobile).

Looking at the charts, they all use `margin={{ top: 8, right: 8, left: -20, bottom: 0 }}`. The plan calls for `left: -15` on mobile for better label fit. Since Recharts doesn't support CSS media queries for margins, I'll use a simple `window.innerWidth` check via a small hook.

Let me add a `useIsMobile` utility and update the chart components.

content.text:
All changes are complete. Here's a summary of what was done:

**CSS (`AnalyticsDashboard.css`) — full rewrite:**
- Glass morphism on stat tiles and chart cards (`backdrop-filter: blur(12px)`, translucent backgrounds, inset glow borders)
- Amber warm glow on tile hover
- Gradient bar fill (amber → sage) on reaction breakdown bars
- Rank badge: amber circle instead of plain text
- Touch-friendly `min-height: 48px` on top post rows
- Glass tooltip with backdrop blur
- Dark mode: proper dark glass backgrounds with subtle borders
- **3 new breakpoints:**
  - `768px` — charts stack to 1-column, reduced padding
  - `480px` — 2-col summary grid, compact range pills (horizontal scroll + snap), hidden score badges + breakdown labels, smaller fonts, tighter gaps
  - `360px` — further compact stat tiles

**Chart components (`ViewsChart`, `ReactionsChart`, `PublishingFrequency`):**
- Added `useMediaQuery` for mobile detection
- Reduced chart `left` margin from `-20` to `-15` on mobile
- Reduced chart height from `220` to `180` on mobile
- `PublishingFrequency` reduces `maxBarSize` to `24` on mobile

**Dashboard (`AnalyticsDashboard.jsx`):**
- Snappier mobile animation: `y: 6` (vs 10) with `0.25s` duration (vs 0.35s)

file.content:
# Analytics Dashboard — Mobile-Friendly Redesign & UI Enhancement

## Context
The Analytics page works on desktop but has limited mobile responsiveness (only one `@media (max-width: 480px)` breakpoint). The user wants it fully mobile-friendly with an enhanced, aesthetic UI. The current design is functional but plain — we'll elevate it with a warm editorial luxury feel consistent with the app's existing aesthetic (Playfair Display, Lora, Outfit fonts, amber/sage accents, glass morphism).

## Design Direction
**Aesthetic:** Warm editorial — refined, literary, intimate. Think a beautifully typeset book's data appendix.
- Subtle warm gradients and soft glows instead of flat cards
- Slightly translucent card backgrounds with backdrop-blur (glass morphism, matching app convention)
- Amber and sage remain the accent palette; introduce a soft rose (`#c97b7b`) as a third accent for variety
- Delicate divider lines, refined spacing, and generous breathing room on mobile
- Charts get softer styling with rounded edges and gentle gradients

## Files to Modify

### 1. `client/src/components/Analytics/AnalyticsDashboard.css` (full rewrite)
Major CSS changes:

**Mobile responsiveness (new breakpoints):**
- `@media (max-width: 768px)` — tablet: stack charts to 1-col, reduce padding
- `@media (max-width: 480px)` — phone: 2-col summary grid, compact range pills, smaller fonts, full-bleed cards, tighter gaps
- `@media (max-width: 360px)` — small phone: further compact stat tiles

**UI enhancements:**
- `.analytics-dashboard`: add `padding: 20px 16px` on mobile (currently 0 horizontal padding)
- `.analytics-stat-tile`: glass morphism — `background: rgba(var(--bg-card-rgb), 0.7)`, `backdrop-filter: blur(12px)`, subtle warm border glow on hover
- `.analytics-chart-card`: same glass treatment, rounded corners 16px, soft shadow
- `.analytics-range-selector`: horizontal scroll on mobile with `overflow-x: auto`, hide scrollbar, snap behavior
- `.analytics-header`: column layout on mobile with title centered, range selector full-width
- `.analytics-top-post-row`: touch-friendly min-height 48px, larger tap targets
- `.analytics-breakdown-bar-fill`: gradient fill (amber to sage) instead of flat amber
- `.analytics-post-rank`: warm amber circle badge instead of plain text
- Chart containers: reduce `min-height` to 180px on mobile for better fit
- Tooltip: glass morphism with subtle border

### 2. `client/src/components/Analytics/AnalyticsDashboard.jsx`
- No structural changes needed — the component composition is clean
- Just ensure the `motion.div` wrapper has appropriate mobile animation (reduce `y` offset on mobile for snappier feel)

### 3. `client/src/components/Analytics/ViewsChart.jsx`
- Reduce chart margin-left on mobile: `left: -25` → `left: -15` for better label fit
- Reduce tick font size on mobile via Recharts tick props (already 11px, keep as-is)

### 4. `client/src/components/Analytics/ReactionsChart.jsx`
- Same margin adjustment as ViewsChart

### 5. `client/src/components/Analytics/PublishingFrequency.jsx`
- Same margin adjustment as ViewsChart
- Reduce `maxBarSize` to 24 on mobile

### 6. `client/src/components/Analytics/TopPosts.jsx`
- On mobile, hide the score badge to save space — show only rank + title + stats
- Add `analytics-post-score-mobile-hide` class with `display: none` at 480px

### 7. `client/src/components/Analytics/AnalyticsSummary.jsx`
- No changes needed (grid handles responsive via CSS)

### 8. `client/src/components/Analytics/TimeRangeSelector.jsx`
- No changes needed (CSS handles responsive)

### 9. `client/src/components/Analytics/ReactionBreakdown.jsx`
- Hide the text label on mobile (keep emoji + bar + count) to save horizontal space
- Add `analytics-breakdown-label-mobile-hide` class

## Detailed CSS Plan

### New responsive breakpoints to add:

```
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .analytics-charts-grid → 1 column
  .analytics-dashboard → padding: 16px 12px
  Chart min-height → 200px
}

@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .analytics-dashboard → padding: 12px 8px, gap: 12px
  .analytics-summary-grid → 2 columns
  .analytics-stat-tile → smaller padding/fonts
  .analytics-tile-value → 20px
  .analytics-range-selector → overflow-x auto, full width
  .analytics-range-pill → smaller padding
  .analytics-header → column, align start
  .analytics-title → 18px
  .analytics-chart-card → border-radius: 12px, padding: 12px
  Chart min-height → 180px
  .analytics-post-score → display: none
  .analytics-breakdown-label → display: none
  .analytics-top-post-row → padding 8px, min-height 44px
  .analytics-post-stats → font-size 10px
}
```

### Glass morphism enhancements (all screen sizes):

```css
.analytics-stat-tile {
  background: var(--bg-card, rgba(255,255,255,0.85));
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
}

.analytics-chart-card {
  background: var(--bg-card, rgba(255,255,255,0.85));
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  border-radius: 16px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
}

.analytics-post-rank {
  background: rgba(245,158,11,0.12);
  border-radius: 50%;
  width: 32px; height: 32px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
}
```

### Dark mode additions:
```css
[data-theme="dark"] .analytics-stat-tile {
  background: rgba(30,30,30,0.7);
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}
[data-theme="dark"] .analytics-chart-card {
  background: rgba(30,30,30,0.7);
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}
```

## Verification
1. Open the app on desktop — confirm the glass morphism and refined styling looks good
2. Resize browser to tablet (~768px) — charts should stack to 1-column
3. Resize to phone (~480px) — summary grid 2-col, compact range pills, score badges hidden, labels hidden in reaction breakdown
4. Test on actual mobile device or Chrome DevTools mobile simulation
5. Toggle dark mode — verify glass cards adapt properly
6. Verify all charts render correctly at each breakpoint (no overflow/clipping)
7. Verify touch targets are large enough on mobile (44px+ height on interactive rows)

content.text: Different task — tooltip positioning/animation fix. Let me explore the current tooltip code.

content.thinking:
The issue is clear. The Recharts `<Tooltip>` component uses default positioning which can cause the tooltip to appear offset from the cursor. The current tooltips also have the glass morphism CSS with `backdrop-filter` which could cause rendering issues. The user also mentions "too much animation."

The problems:
1. Tooltip positioning is off — Recharts default tooltip positioning can be wonky, especially with negative margins and on smaller chart areas
2. Too much animation — likely referring to the Recharts default tooltip animation (it has a fade/slide animation by default)

Fixes:
1. Add `isAnimationActive={false}` to the `<Tooltip>` component to disable the animation


2. For positioning, I can pass a custom tooltip component and use `offset` to adjust the distance from the cursor, or control it with `wrapperStyle` if needed. The `cursor` styling can also help with visual feedback.

The simplest approach is disabling the animation with `isAnimationActive={false}` and optionally adding an `offset` parameter to fine-tune the distance. Since the backdrop-filter effect can cause visual glitches during animations, removing the animation should resolve that issue as well.

content.text: The issue is straightforward — Recharts tooltips have a default fade/slide animation that, combined with the glass morphism `backdrop-filter`, creates a jittery/offset feel. Simple fix needed.

input.content:
# Fix Analytics Chart Tooltip — Positioning & Animation

## Context
Chart tooltips feel "off" when hovering — the Recharts default tooltip has a fade/slide animation that combined with `backdrop-filter: blur()` on the tooltip CSS creates a jittery, laggy feel. The tooltip also drifts from the cursor position.

## Fix
Disable Recharts tooltip animation and tighten offset in all 3 chart components:

### Files to modify
1. **`client/src/components/Analytics/ViewsChart.jsx`** (line 51)
2. **`client/src/components/Analytics/ReactionsChart.jsx`** (line 51)
3. **`client/src/components/Analytics/PublishingFrequency.jsx`** (line 45)

### Change in each file
Replace:
```jsx
<Tooltip content={<CustomTooltip />} />
```
With:
```jsx
<Tooltip content={<CustomTooltip />} isAnimationActive={false} offset={10} />
```

- `isAnimationActive={false}` — removes the fade/slide transition that causes the laggy/offset feel
- `offset={10}` — keeps tooltip close to cursor without overlapping the data point

## Verification
1. Hover over each chart (Views, Reactions, Publishing Frequency)
2. Tooltip should appear instantly at cursor position with no animation delay
3. Tooltip should track the cursor smoothly as you move across data points
4. Test in dark mode too — the glass tooltip should still look clean

}

@media (max-width: 480px) {

```css
.analytics-stat-tile {
  background: var(--bg-card, rgba(255,255,255,0.85));

  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
}

.analytics-chart-card {
  background: var(--bg-card, rgba(255,255,255,0.85));
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  border-radius: 16px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
}

.analytics-post-rank {
  background: rgba(245,158,11,0.12);

```css
[data-theme="dark"] .analytics-stat-tile {

}
[data-theme="dark"] .analytics-chart-card {
  background: rgba(30,30,30,0.7);
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}
```

1. Open the app on desktop — confirm the glass morphism and refined styling looks good
2. Resize browser to tablet (~768px) — charts should stack to 1-column
3. Resize to phone (~480px) — summary grid 2-col, compact range pills, score badges hidden, labels hidden in reaction breakdown

5. Toggle dark mode — verify glass cards adapt properly
6. Verify all charts render correctly at each breakpoint (no overflow/clipping)
7. Verify touch targets are large enough on mobile (44px+ height on interactive rows)
